All instruments · All levels · Online or in person

Learn the instrument you've always wanted to play.

Freda connects students with real, working musicians for one-on-one lessons — violin, piano, theory, and beyond. Tutors teach, students learn, everyone gets on stage eventually.

Register as a Student Apply to Teach

How it works

Three steps, no audition.

01 / REGISTER

Tell us what you want to learn

Sign up as a student with your instrument, level, and whether you'd rather learn online or face-to-face.

02 / GET MATCHED

We pair you with a tutor

Every tutor on Freda registers too — instrument, experience, and rate — so matches are never a guess.

03 / START PLAYING

Your first lesson, booked

We reach out by WhatsApp or email within 48 hours to confirm your first session and get you started.

The setlist

Current lesson rates

Violin, piano, and theory are our most-booked lessons — but every instrument is on the bill. Register as a tutor and add yours.

TRACK 01
ViolinBowing, technique, repertoire
All levels
$15/hr
TRACK 02
PianoClassical, contemporary, sight-reading
All levels
$20/hr
TRACK 03
Music TheoryReading, harmony, ear training
All levels
$15/hr
TRACK 04
Guitar, Drums & MoreAny instrument with a registered tutor
All levels
$15/hr

Rates shown are starting hourly rates. Tutors set their own pricing for specialized or advanced instruction.

Join the bill

Register as a student or a tutor

Fill out the form that fits you. We'll be in touch on WhatsApp or email to confirm next steps.

📬 Applications go straight to your inbox. Every form submission is emailed to fredasteve1@gmail.com automatically. First-time setup: FormSubmit will send a one-time confirmation email to that address — click the link in it to activate delivery.
